body: This PR adds stack trace-based CUDA kernel naming to make performance benchmarks more informative. Kernel names are computed once per session and cached in a module-level Dict. - [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A. - [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A. - [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A. - [ ] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A. ## TODO: - [x] Confirm we get useful results, i.e., that we don't spend too much time computing the kernel name and wash out the timeline. ## Example results from ClimaAtmos Buildkite From [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-ci/builds/26622/steps/canvas?sid=019a49af-90d4-4479-909b-8c512e3aee30)
title: Name CUDA kernels based on stack trace in `auto_launch`
